title: Save search result as a new view in mywork
excerpt: I just started exploring the myWork. I thought it could be very useful to enable a custom view based on the search result (or filter result) similar to what the standard board does. That way, there will be always a dedic…

posts.author: Ben_psi (Ben Liu)
posts.cookedHtml: I just started exploring the myWork. I thought it could be very useful to enable a custom view based on the search result (or filter result) similar to what the standard board does. That way, there will be always a dedicated view for certain tasks. thoughts?
